{# overview_tab.html — Vendor overview tab content (safety, contacts, sightings). Receives: vendor, contacts, recent_sightings, safety_band, safety_summary, safety_flags, safety_score, safety_available. Called by: vendor_tab route (overview tab) in htmx_views.py. Depends on: partials/shared/safety_review.html, partials/shared/source_badge.html, brand palette. #}

{% else %}
